title: Beehiiv vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Drip email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your business best.
h1: Beehiiv vs Drip: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Beehiiv and Drip are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers and content creators with monetization features, while Drip specializes in e-commerce email marketing with deep store integration. Your choice depends on whether you're building a subscriber-driven publication or running an online store.

comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce businesses with store integration needs

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program, web reader
comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce tracking, revenue attribution, SMS, visual automation, onsite campaigns

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher or content creator looking to monetize your audience
You want to start for free and scale gradually without upfront costs
You need an ad network and referral program to grow your subscriber base
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need deep integration with your shopping platform
Revenue attribution and order tracking are critical to your email strategy
You want SMS marketing capabilities built into your email platform

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with its monetization features and free tier, while Drip is superior for e-commerce businesses needing advanced store integration. Beehiiv has higher user ratings (4.7 vs 4.4 on G2), but Drip offers more specialized e-commerce features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Drip?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper because it offers a free tier for up to 2,500 subscribers, making it ideal for startups. Drip requires a paid subscription starting at $39/month with no free option. If you need paid features, both start at the same $39/month price point.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber list and email campaigns between platforms. Most email marketing tools support CSV exports and imports, so the technical process is straightforward. However, you'll need to rebuild automation workflows and customize templates in Beehiiv, as these don't typically transfer directly.
